description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and releases tbd-sim-tapp-tbd4vcv-linux on push to the test branch and on pull requests to test. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, install dependencies, checkout the repository and submodules, build the project in multiple directories, download and process the Rack SDK, and archive the binaries. Finally, create a draft pre-release with the archived binaries as an asset.
